.status-bar.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgba(66, 184, 131, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-active.is-clickable.nav-file-titl.background: rgba(66, 184, 131, 0.05) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgba(66, 184, 131, 0.05) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgba(66, 184, 131, 0.05) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(66, 184, 131, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(248, 248, 248) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(248, 248, 248) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(248, 248, 248) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(even).background: rgb(250, 250, 250) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

thead.background: rgb(242, 242, 242) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
